summary:
PROPHETIC WARNINGS AND GLOBAL CRISES: Brandon recounts recent events regarding a thwarted assassination attempt at a Coachella rally involving a man with weapons and fake passports, linking this to his prior prophetic warnings and intensive prayers about mass gatherings and specific plots orchestrated by figures like George Soros. Brandon also details previous apocalyptic visions, including a devastating volcano in Italy that could kill hundreds of thousands, an asteroid striking the Atlantic Ocean, a massive explosion in Poland, and an accelerating global conflict involving Israel and Iran. Furthermore, Brandon predicts a severe economic collapse characterized by the dollar losing half its value, bank seizures, food lines reminiscent of the Great Depression, the strengthening of BRICS nations against the petrodollar, and skyrocketing fuel prices reaching up to ten dollars a gallon.

SPIRITUAL REVIVAL AND HISTORICAL AWAKENINGS: Brandon draws parallels between the current spiritual climate and historical outpourings of faith, specifically referencing the Welsh revival where miners stopped cursing to the point that their work animals no longer understood commands. Brandon also highlights the eighteenth-century revivals led by John Wesley and Charles Finney, noting how the powerful presence of God would physically knock people out. Brandon emphasizes that America's salvation will not come from political figures like Donald Trump, but rather through a profound spiritual awakening and a return to uncompromising righteousness, warning against modern seeker-friendly, lukewarm church practices that fail to teach true spiritual warfare and biblical depth.

PERSONAL TESTIMONIES AND HEALING MINISTRATIONS: Brandon shares a profound personal testimony regarding his daughter Megan, who was diagnosed with autism and medically predicted to remain at an eighteen-month developmental level indefinitely. Brandon describes how persistent faith and a specific healing service led to her miraculous and progressive ability to be potty trained, defying medical expectations. Extending this healing focus to the audience, Brandon conducts targeted intercessory prayers for various ailments, specifically calling out healing for a woman named Bonnie suffering from ten-year menopausal symptoms, as well as praying for broken ribs, arthritis, back discs, and overall bodily restoration through the power of Jesus Christ.

FINANCIAL PROSPERITY AND AGRICULTURAL PREPAREDNESS: Brandon extensively teaches on the biblical principles of seedtime and harvest, urging listeners to sow seeds into fertile spiritual ground to reap financial multiplication, debt cancellation, and career promotions. Brandon strictly warns against the concept of borrowing money to give, instead advocating for faithful tithing and generous giving from what one possesses, emphasizing that God will provide supernatural ideas for wealth generation and overflow. Additionally, Brandon strongly recommends investing in a Tower Garden for practical agricultural preparedness, praising a fellow believer for the recommendation and urging his audience to research it as a necessary tool for the coming times.

SOCIETAL COMPROMISE AND SPIRITUAL WARFARE: Brandon delivers a stark warning against participating in Halloween celebrations, describing the holiday as deeply rooted in demonic strongholds, witchcraft, and child sacrifice, using an analogy of contaminated brownies to illustrate that light can have no fellowship with darkness. Brandon criticizes pastors who host community events for the holiday, calling for an uncompromising stance against societal integration with evil. Furthermore, Brandon describes a vision of a literal stove where political forces in Washington are cooking up tribulation for the masses, asserting that God is raising a new generation of masculine warriors with backbone to face the intensifying birthing pains, rejecting the feminization and superficiality of modern church culture in favor of raw, transformative spiritual power.

POLITICAL VISIONS AND NATIONAL INTERCESSION: Brandon details a prophetic vision concerning Donald Trump, observing him in the Oval Office under immense pressure but enveloped in the glory of God. Brandon describes Trump experiencing a radical conversion and passionately interceding for America alongside others, leading to the darkness hovering over the nation temporarily lifting above the tree line. Brandon concludes that this divine intervention and shock to the nation provides a crucial window of grace, reinforcing his overarching message that only deep repentance, prayer, and the undeniable manifestation of God's power can truly save and heal the land.
rawData: [October 15, 2024]-[A call to prayer - day 8 - there’s only one thing that will save America]-[https://youtu.be/p2Fr3ecBBeo]-[Well, good morning family. Praise the Lord. It has been an amazing 24 hours. I am just burning with the fire of the Lord today. I am so excited to come on here and talk to you and tell you what the Lord did last night. I am in awe at what the Lord—I have so many different directions I could go right now. But first, I want to tell you all how exciting it is that I heard all the testimonies about the Coachella assassination attempt. The sheriff came on there and said he had fake passports, he had fake driver's license plates, he had guns and everything inside of his car. They released him on bail for $5,000, but he didn't do anything because God intervened. People were like, "Well, where did you prophesy this?"—the doubters. The Lord had me pray very hard for Coachella. I kept praying for this word "Coachella," and I kept getting this in the spirit realm. So, I told my friend about it and he helped me Google it. Then my wife helped me Google this word. We're going to pray for these major events and big gatherings of people, for nothing to happen. The Lord said, "This is how they're going to run their campaign in 2024." And he said, "You need to tell the people to pray and hear the voice of the Lord concerning every place they go in their day-to-day activity, major events, and going with crowds and concerts." That's why I prayed for Coachella. The Lord had me praying for this. We'll pray against it for this year. I've been praying over Coachella; there are a lot of events to pray over. When I warned you all about the shootings at Coachella that were coming up in a couple of days, that was a warning I got this time last year. And the Lord told me, "Pray over this. This is a plot from the enemy." I told you about George Soros and these people over there. I saw bad men over in Europe having a meeting with the devil at the same time last year when he warned me to pray over Coachella and said that they were plotting something against it. The Lord warned me about that and told me to pray for that. I intercede for a lot of things, y'all. But they said, "Well, you've missed it. How many things have you gotten to come to pass that the Lord shows you?" And I say, "Man, I've sat on stuff for five years, sometimes longer, before anything ever starts to be in the news." I'm still praying over the thing in Italy the Lord showed me when I warned you all that a major volcano was going to go off and it was going to wipe out the whole coastal city. I saw over 300,000 people—boom—dead that fast because of the volcano going off. I'm trying to steer you all to show you where I'm at and where I've been praying. So, praying over Coachella, and then the Lord was warning me about big gatherings again. I was sent an email and even a text from a friend telling me, "Hey, do you remember praying over Coachella?" I got this and I've been praying over Coachella. The Lord will show me, like I said, way in advance of events trying to manifest, and I take authority over them so that they don't manifest. I saw a mass shooting event happening at Coachella and the Lord said, "I want you to pray over this event so that this does not take place." Well, I thought it was the concert event. Maybe it was; I don't know. Like I said, we hear in part and we see in part. So when you're looking through the filter of what the Lord is trying to tell you, you just keep praying. The Lord told me to start praying over this, that this was a serious thing to pray over. Well, my friend sent me a text and he said, "Hey Brandon, did you see that President Trump was going to Coachella to hold a rally there?" I had no idea. So, with the things that you get in the spirit of warnings and prayer, you try to put your own mind to it and you get in trouble because you're thinking it's the concert. All I know is that's what we pray. Whether it was the presidential thing that's going to happen this weekend with the speech and all that, I don't know, because all I know is the Lord warned me and told me to pray over this stuff. But did it witness with me that this could be it? Yeah. I thought this is probably it. More than likely, we were going to pray over Coachella again, this Trump rally that's coming on Saturday, and if there are any plots or any plans, we call them exposed in Jesus' name—that they would be caught in the name of Jesus. We call for supernatural wisdom over the Secret Service, supernatural wisdom over the FBI—the good FBI—CIA, Homeland Security, all of them. The Riverside County Sheriff's Department just announced an arrest from former President Donald Trump's rally in Coachella. If you're asking me right now, I probably did have deputies that prevented the third assassination attempt. A man carrying several guns and fake passes was stopped by police at a rally in Coachella Valley over the weekend. This is not about boasting about my platform, but about warning you to pray and intercede on behalf of America because God is not done with America. God is not finished with what he's about to do in America. There is going to be a great harvest of souls beyond anybody's comprehension that's about to come to this land. I was thinking about the old Welsh revival and how they said the glory of God came with fire. It happened so strongly that the miners who would work in the mines in Wales in that area had to shut down the mines because the mules and the donkeys that were working only knew how to take commands with cuss words. But when the fire of God came on those miners and they got the Holy Ghost on their mouths and were delivered from things, they stopped the profanity. So, the donkeys and the mules did not know how to respond anymore. They had to shut down the mines because the glory came. It took time to train the donkeys and the mules again. The glory came there, and they were asking one little girl, "What do you feel about what's happened to the revival here?" And she said, "It's like Jesus; we have Sunday every day." All I can say is, "Lord, do it again." There was an awe with the presence of God throughout the whole city. There was an awe on every street corner. And I'm telling you, we had revivals in the 1700s with John Wesley and Finney. The glory would come so strongly when they would preach in these revivals that they would tell people to get out of the trees because they would climb them to get a better view. But John Wesley would warn them to get out of the trees because when he would speak, the glory of God would fill up the outside—not in an inside building—but the presence of the Lord would weigh so strongly that the power of God would knock people out of the trees, and he didn't want them to get hurt. I'm telling you, a glory will come again. I'm telling you, an outpouring of his presence is coming again. One last call: the Lord warns me and tells me today when I pray. Thank God he spared Trump's life again. It was a call to prayer for 30 days. But the enemy has a plan, ladies and gentlemen. I've told you even five or six days after the election—if you didn't believe me before, do you believe me now when I tell you the Lord tells me to come on here and warn you about what's coming? Maybe this time when you see the next sign, maybe you will listen. I pray you do because I'm trying as a watchman on the wall, yelling with all I have to warn you that Jesus Christ is coming—not for anything else, but to warn you that Jesus is coming. Jesus is coming, and there is a great outpouring of His Spirit that's coming. There is a great shaking to awaken. People don't want to hear about the other side of the coin, the dark side. But there are dark days coming, just as there are light days coming. I try very hard now to speak about both. But when I have told you about financial crisis, things that I've seen coming—a dollar shaking, worth fifty cents on the dollar, the seizing of the monies in the bank, warning you of a Great Depression with people lined up for miles trying to get food—warning you that I've seen an asteroid hit in the Atlantic Ocean, a great explosion in Poland, and an acceleration of war. I've seen Israel attack Iran and the oil, so much so that Saudi Arabia and the BRICS nations will come together stronger against the petrodollar. I saw the oil go over two hundred dollars a barrel. I saw gasoline going well over eight, nine, or ten dollars a gallon on average. Is it supposed to scare you? No. It's to warn you and to prepare you. I bring these things up to warn you, to shake you, to say, 'Listen, we can pray.' I didn't come on this channel to tickle your ears or to entertain you, to make you go, 'Well, that was a really good message; it gave me goosebumps,' and then go back to your apathy, your laziness, and your being slothful and asleep. I come on here to shake you, to tell you that there's a plan afoot for the devil's work. But God has a plan that's bigger. And if we would plug ourselves in and get excited about what God is going to do in these last days, and humble ourselves and pray and turn from our wicked ways, then He said we would hear from heaven and He would heal our land. You all think Donald Trump is going to save America. But there is only one person that will save America, and that is Jesus Christ and an awakening unto God. America will not be saved without an awakening unto God. America is in the place where we're trying to change the fruit of America without changing the root. And a lot of you think we can just change the fruit, but the problem is the root is bad. Donald Trump isn't going to change the fruit. The problem is we're not preaching righteousness and holiness in the pulpits anymore. We preach a lukewarm, seeker-friendly message. We're feeding the babies porridge and milk, and they don't have meat to grow because we aren't teaching the Word of God to the people—the meat of the Word, the ABCs of faith—teaching them how to live by faith and how to stay strong, how to cast out devils, to do the Great Commission, to lay hands on the sick and see them recover, to raise the dead, to bring sight to the blind, to open ears, and to tell the lame to leap and walk. We have that ability on the inside of us. Jesus Christ lives on the inside of every single one of you. And I have such an urgency today, an urgency to tell you like Paul Revere yelling on his horse, 'The British are coming! The British are coming!' but to tell you in the midnight hour that I'm riding on the horse through town after town via this YouTube channel, telling the whole world that Jesus Christ is coming, and yet you're still asleep. I yell from the mountaintops that Jesus is coming. I had a visitation again last night. I cannot tell you what He said this time because it was for me, but I can tell you this: He said, 'A lot of the older generals are going to start to go home, and you're going to see a new generation of Davids rise up.' You will see this shortly: a great move of His presence beyond anything you've ever seen before. It's not years away anymore; it's not days away. It's now. You're going to start to see the manifestation of things. I'm telling you all, it's time to get your hearts right before the Lord Jesus Christ. It's time for you to seek Him like you've never sought Him before. Jesus is the healer; He's the same yesterday, today, and forever, and you're about to see it. I went to a healing service last night, and the power of God knocked me on my rear. My wife and children were all touched by the glory. And we got a word from the minister there. We prayed for my little girl Megan, and the glory filled the room. You know, when you go and you're not expecting much, you're just excited to be a part of things. I never anticipate anything like that—a word from anybody. I just go and want to watch someone else get blessed. I'm excited just to be there. But he asked for people to come up and tell their testimonies about what God had done for them in the past. And I went and told them about taking her to that service a couple of years ago when he prayed for her and, within a week or two, my daughter was completely potty trained. Supernaturally, even though the doctors said Megan would never be potty trained. They told us that she would maintain the level of eighteen months for the rest of her life and to never expect her to be potty trained. There were so many negative things that neuropsychologist said. That's when I told him all things are possible to him that believes. He told my wife, 'You all are in denial. You need to come to reality. I've never seen, in thousands and thousands of cases over thirty or forty years, an autistic child ever healed.' And that's when my wife looked at him and said, 'But my daughter will be. She'll be the first, and we're going to come back here and give you a testimony.' Well, we stood and stood, and when there is nothing else to do, you stand. Whenever you don't see the fruit of what you're believing for in full manifestation, you keep standing. You don't give up. Faith calls those things that be not as though they were. So we believe some more; we keep standing. You find your Bible verses, you keep reading them, and you keep believing it. Then we had the encounter, and Megan started pottying on the stool. Within just a day, she woke up, sat down, and went to the bathroom—that was a miracle in itself, and it's been progressive. But a miracle is a miracle even if it's progressive, especially when you realize how far she has come. Well, last night we took her again, and he asked if anybody had a testimony. So I went down to the front to tell him about Megan, just excited about it, saying, 'God, this is a big deal,' because we spent a lot of money on adult diapers, and they're very expensive. He laid hands on her, and the power of God went all over her. He gave us a word about our ministry, gave a word over my wife, and really filled us with fire and encouragement. I'm expecting a supernatural turnaround. I'm expecting—I told you there will be a day when my daughter comes on here and tells you all the goodness of our God, that Jesus is the healer. He is a healer, and He is going to visit America one last time in a mighty outpouring of His Spirit. Coachella was just a prayer assignment. That's the way he deals with me all the time. Like I said, the more you get to know me, I come on and do these videos over these 30 days. People are asking me to continue to do it afterwards. We'll see; I probably will. I feel an urgency to do this more and more. I just thought you all would get tired of it and not show up. I mean, honestly, I thought, 'Well, if the people show up and they want to pray, we might as well pray.' You know, whenever people don't show up, it's discouraging. You go, 'Well, what's the point?' That is what you think in your natural mind. If they're not going to show up and pray, then whatever. But God had an assignment. I didn't know what the turnout was going to be, and I really didn't care. He told me to do it. He said, 'Do it,' and I said, 'Okay, Lord, I'll do it.' And people are showing up and we're making a difference. I'm going to pray today for an outpouring, but we have to take communion first. Excuse me. Father, we thank you for your body. We thank you for what you did on that cross 2,000 years ago. We thank you that you said, 'By your stripes, I am healed,' from the top of our head to the soles of our feet, Lord. We lift up this body before you, God. I thank you that you were wounded for our transgressions, you were bruised for our iniquities, the chastisement of our peace was upon you, and with your stripes, we are healed. Megan's healed. Reed is healed. I got a call from a lady who broke her ribs, and I lift up her ribs before you in the name of Jesus. I thank you, Father, that you're healing her from the top of her head to her feet. All her ribs are healed in Jesus' name. We say supernaturally, put them back together with a creative miracle with no more pain. And we say, 'Satan, get your hands off of God's property.' This is his child in Jesus' name. Father, I thank you, Lord, for the body right now and we lift it up before you and we thank you. We thank you, Father, for what you did for us on Calvary. We take this body right now in Jesus' name. Now Lord, we lift up the blood and we thank you. We enter in by the blood of the lamb and by the word of our testimony. We have authority over the devil. I thank you for the blood, Lord. We take this blood right now in the name of Jesus, and it washes us of our sins and we enter into your throne room with great boldness today as we pray. We take our dominion and authority over this earth because you've given us dominion and authority. We thank you, Father, that we are washed in the blood, the cleansing blood of the lamb. Thank you, Father, for the blood. Thank you for your blood, Lord. It never loses its power. We lift up the blood, Father, and we thank you. We thank you, Father, for the blood that washes us from all our sins. Father, you said to make much of the blood, and the blood will make much of you. And we take the blood right now in the name of Jesus. Now Lord, we enter in boldly to your throne. I saw in the comment section—my son told me—there's a lady that's believing for healing. He said, 'Pray for her.' She really needed prayer for her menopause. It's very serious; it's been going on ten years. Ten-year menopause—no more. The Lord spoke to me about this and I'm believing with you. The menopause symptoms of ten years are gone now in the name of Jesus. We speak to the hormones of this woman who has been bound by these menopausal symptoms for ten years. We say healing flow over your body right now in the name of Jesus. From the top of your head to the soles of your feet, I pronounce you healed by his stripes. We say, 'Bonnie, you are healed. Bonnie, you are delivered. Bonnie, in the name of Jesus, no more of this.' It is a curse. This is not living in abundance to the full until it overflows. So we speak to the hormones, the pituitary gland, and the glands of the mind to line up in the name of Jesus with the word of God. We say in the name of Jesus, hormones line up. Ovaries line up. The signals to the body, we call healing in the name of Jesus. We call deliverance in the name of Jesus. And we thank you, Father, that you're restoring her body from the top of her head to the soles of her feet. No more of this menopause stuff. Father, we thank you for the demonstrations and the manifestations of your glory. Lord, we plead the blood over every single person that is represented here. I attach my faith with theirs that you are visiting their house today. Father, with your healing touch, nothing's too big and nothing's too small. By his stripes, you are healed in the name of Jesus. I thank you, Lord, for the healing power that flows on the inside of them in the name of Jesus. I call them healed, I call them whole, I call them well in the name of Jesus—every single one of them. Father, I pray over their minds, over their emotions, over every area of their life where they're lacking. We thank you, Father, for the healing power that flows on the inside of their bodies. I thank you, Lord, for healing arthritis of the necks and all the way down their backs. I call them healed and whole, discs in their backs to be restored. All the discs and any kind of pain in the backs, on their joints, their knees, their legs, and their ankles. Father, all the joints of the body, I call them healed and whole and well in the name of Jesus. I thank you, Father, that we take authority over these things and we call those things that be not as though they were. Father, Lord, we speak to the bones in the name of Jesus. Now God, I thank you for finances for the people, Father, for the sowers, Father, that they will reap if they faint not. And we thank you, Lord. We pray miracle-grow soil on their seed. We speak blessing and increase over their household. Now, you can't sit there and complain about your finances if you haven't sown a seed. Even if it's like the widow's mite, you have to sow seed. Seedtime and harvest come by whatsoever things you sow that we also reap. Farmers sow a crop to reap a crop. So we speak to the seed of the finances and we say in the name of Jesus, 'Satan, get your hands off of their money.' We call for creative ideas to get wealth. I thank you, Father, that you're visiting them in the midnight hours, in the night when they're sleeping, and you would speak in their dreams. You would speak to them, and Father, you would give them creative ideas to get wealth. I thank you for supernatural wisdom, Father, for jobs and better jobs, for great promotions at their work, that favor follows the believer. For goodness and mercy will follow you all the days of your life, and we will dwell in the house of the Lord forever. So, Father, we speak to the favor and we say, 'Favor is following us. Goodness and mercy is following us.' And Father, I thank you that favor is running. It's overflow time. It's in abundance to the full until it overflows. Father, I thank you for supernatural favor coming to each and every single person on this YouTube channel. Father, that you bless them indeed and that you increase their land and that you enlarge their territory that they would cause no pain. We thank you for supernatural increase over their jobs. Father, you said whatever they put their hands to will prosper. I thank you, Lord, that Father there is an anointing to prosper, not to be having lack but to have abundance. So I pray over their harvest. I pray over their hands. Father, I thank you for supernatural favor of open doors of opportunity to create wealth. Opportunity is coming in the name of Jesus. The camels are coming in the name of Jesus. We say the harvesters are coming in the name of Jesus. It's harvest time, a great manifestation of the harvest. We call forth harvesting of the seed—harvesting from what you've planted. Father, the supernatural acceleration of financial outpouring is coming in the name of Jesus. We thank you, Lord, for this will be a time of great acceleration; for whatever was dormant will grow suddenly. Father, I thank you, Lord, that we line up with what the word of God said in Deuteronomy 28: 'And all these blessings shall come upon thee and overtake thee.' I thank you, Lord, that it's an overtaking blessing, not a barely getting by; that we are a lender unto many, and we shall not borrow. We're the head and not the tail, above and not beneath. We'll go through and will not go under. For Father, this is a time of great supernatural harvest acceleration. Father, we take authority over these things, and I want you to agree with me. Agree with me for supernatural debt cancellation. Father, I thank you that the notes are paid off in full—from student loans to car loans to house loans to credit card debt. Father, I thank you, Lord, that it's paid off in full in the name of Jesus. I heard one minister say, "Well, you just sow on your credit card." I don't believe that. No, you don't borrow to sow. I believe you give. If the Lord tells you to give something, you give what you have. You don't borrow again and go in more debt. I don't believe that. Whatever. I believe that you can give good measure, pressed down, shaken together, and running over will men give into your bosom. The wealth of the sinners is laid up for the righteous. There's a lot of gimmicks, spiritual flakiness, and con artists that I've seen, and God help them. But the seedtime and harvest works. I'm a product of it. I believe it. But I sow. You have to sow into good ground. People say, "Well, what I sowed, I didn't get anything back." Well, what ground did you sow into? Sow into good ground. Sow into ground that reaps. For the Bible even says some thirty, some sixty, and a hundredfold. Well, they say, "Well, I don't receive nothing." Well, are you cursing your seed? What does your mountain say? What are you saying to your mountain? What is your mouth saying out over your seed every day? Because life and death is in the power of your tongue. I said the Lord said it again: life and death is in the power of your tongue. And you're living today what you said yesterday. What you've said over the years, you continue to live. It takes a little bit of time to turn the ship around. A big cruise ship, they can't just turn it like a little sports car. It takes a little bit to turn that battleship around. And I'm trying to tell you, a lot of you have been living and speaking negativity all the time—doubting Thomas all the time—and you're living what you've been saying for the last twenty years. So don't get discouraged if it takes a little bit to turn that negative around. You've got to speak to your circumstances and call those things that be not as though they were. And you will see the manifestation if you faint not. Stand when all there else to do is stand. Stand, therefore, speaking psalms, hymns, and spiritual songs, making melody in your heart, giving God praise out of your mouth. Thank you, Father, for the manifestation. Thank you, Lord, that you are taking care of me. Father, I thank you, Lord, that you said in your word that you are my healer, that you are my provider. You're the great Jehovah Jireh. And Lord, I only have a dollar or a quarter to give, but I know that if I sow, you, Father, said that you would bring forth some thirty, some sixty, and a hundredfold. So, Father, I thank you. You show me the good ground. And I believe he that wins souls is wise. So, I look for people who are getting a lot of people saved, that are helping the widow. I've noticed the more you bless the widow, the more you take care of the widow, there's a covering. There's a spiritual blessing behind that because he commissioned us to do it. To take care of the orphan, to take care of the person in the prison, to send them Bibles, to help people that were in prison so that they get born again, to rehabilitate them, to preach to the widows, to help the widow out that can't help themselves. It's honorable, and to pray and take care of the Jews. There's blessings behind this. I look for blessing ground. Who's helping people out? Who's blessing the people that can't help themselves? The orphan. That's one. Look at the people like that. I look at people who are doing things and blessing ground. I'm just telling you all: study. Study. The Bible says, "Study to show yourself approved." And I believe with all my heart we are accountable for our seed. Don't eat your seed. A lot of people eat their seed. Don't eat it; sow it. I believe in the tithe. They said, "Well, tithing has been done away with and we don't have to tithe anymore because that was part of the law, and Jesus came and redeemed us from the curse of the law." We don't have to be underneath that. And I hear all kinds of people: "Oh, you don't tithe? I don't tithe anymore. I don't believe in tithing." I do. I believe it with all my heart. I believe in the power of a seed. I believe in sowing overflow and believing God for extra. And he said, "Whatever you put your hands to will prosper." And I'm telling you, when you put God over your finances and you make him ruler over your life... you say, "Well, I can't afford to tithe." I always told my wife, even when we were living off food stamps: "We cannot afford not to tithe because I'm believing God for extra." I believe God. I'm believing God for exceeding abundantly above all we ask or think. I don't want to live paycheck to paycheck. And I know that my God shall supply all my needs according to his riches and glory by Christ Jesus. A lot of people don't preach that anymore. They get afraid of it because they get tired of the persecution. They get tired of the ugly letters in the mail, tired of the comment section. So they shy away from it. "All you want is our money." I've heard it. I work for megachurches. I saw it. My wife counted the offerings, and people were very aggressive about it being about money. If you want to touch somebody and get them mad, you talk about money and they get real squirmy real quick. Or you start talking about their pet peeves and you want to get somebody's attention. Just like what it is with the economy. Just like the Lord told me, there's a great shaking coming. There's a great shaking coming with the economy because it's the pocketbook. It's the god of people. Money is a god to people. Everybody is obsessed with it. It's nuts. But it's power, and that's what gives people their lusts. A lot of them are able to do what they want to do; they live extravagantly and party and drink and act a fool, but it takes money to do that. And you know what? I'm going to say this—I just saw this in a vision right then: Halloween is coming. Wow. I just keep going down these trails and the Lord keeps talking to me about these people celebrating Halloween. God help you. If you truly knew the witchcraft behind this holiday and the demonic strongholds attached to it, you would know there is so much bondage with Halloween, satanic sacrifices, and witchcraft.
